name: Arepas Rellenas Con Guiso De Carne
recipeInstructions:
Heat oil in a heavy skillet over medium heat. Add meat, onions, garlic, green chile, tomatoes, achiote, cumin, thyme, black pepper, and salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, for 20 minutes or until the tomatoes have formed a thick sauce. Stir in olives and capers.
Prepare a recipe of basic arepa dough. Shape into 3-inch discs (3/4-inch thick) and cook. When done, split each arepa in half, fill with meat sauce, and serve hot.
